MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar May-23-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. GEOFFREY ROTWEIN, TEL. NO. 397-0860 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT DANIEL GARCIA'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND MOTION TO DISMISS IS GRANTED, THE MOTION IS TREATED AS A MOTION TO VACATE UNDER C C P 473 (B) ON THE BASIS THAT SERVICE OF SUMMONS WAS INEFFECTIVE. DEFENDANT HAS OFFERED SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE THAT HE WAS NOT PERSONALLY SERVED. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
